vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.description: Building a thriving cue sports community through dedication, development, and sustainable growth. We envision a future where cue sports flourish in Jalandhar District, creating opportunities for players of all skill levels.

pillars.title: Organic Growth
pillars.description: Fostering natural development of talent through grassroots programs and community engagement, ensuring sustainable expansion of cue sports participation across all age groups.

pillars.title: Organic Development
pillars.description: Nurturing players through structured training programs and mentorship, creating pathways for continuous skill improvement and competitive excellence.

pillars.title: Sustainability
pillars.description: Building lasting infrastructure and partnerships that ensure the long-term viability of cue sports in our region, creating a legacy for future generations.

points.title: Training & Development
points.description: Providing comprehensive coaching programs and training facilities to develop players from beginners to advanced levels, with focus on technique, strategy, and sportsmanship.

points.title: Tournament Organization
points.description: Organizing regular competitions and championships that provide competitive opportunities for players, promote the sport, and showcase local talent at district and state levels.

points.title: Community Building
points.description: Creating an inclusive and supportive community of cue sports enthusiasts, fostering camaraderie, networking, and shared passion for snooker, billiards, and pool.

points.title: Talent Recognition
points.description: Identifying and supporting promising players through recognition programs, sponsorships, and pathways to higher levels of competition, ensuring no talent goes unnoticed.

items.title: Promote the Sport of Snooker
items.description: To actively promote snooker at district, state, and national levels by increasing awareness, visibility, and participation in the sport.

items.title: Support & Develop Players
items.description: To provide players with tournament information, ranking updates, training resources, and performance highlights. Helping them grow from beginners to professional-level competitors.

items.title: Organize & Showcase Tournaments
items.description: To publish schedules, results, fixtures, and photo galleries of local championships, district-level tournaments, and special snooker events ensuring transparency and engagement.

items.title: Digital Hub for Members
items.description: To create a centralized platform where members can register for events, access updates and notices, view official announcements, and stay connected with the association.

items.title: Build a Snooker Community
items.description: To connect players, coaches, referees, sponsors, and fans under one digital platform and encourage sportsmanship and collaboration.

items.title: Provide News & Updates
items.description: To keep visitors informed about upcoming matches, player achievements, association activities, and national & international snooker highlights.

items.title: Encourage Youth Participation
items.description: To inspire young talent by promoting training programs, academies, and development initiatives.

leadership.heading: Leadership Team
leadership.description: Meet our dedicated leadership team committed to excellence in cue sports

members.name: Dharminder Singh Lilly
members.bio: Leading the association with dedication and vision to promote cue sports excellence in Jalandhar District.

members.name: Vivek Chopra
members.bio: Experienced administrator with a focus on tournament organization and community engagement.

members.name: Rajat Sharma
members.bio: Financial expert ensuring sustainable growth and transparent management of association resources.

members.name: Rajan Sehgal
members.bio: Building community connections and fostering engagement among members and stakeholders.

executive.heading: Executive Committee
executive.description: Our executive team working tirelessly to support and grow cue sports

news.heading: Latest News
news.description: Stay updated with the latest happenings in cue sports

items.title: Pankaj Advani Wins World Championship 2024
items.description: Indian cue sports legend Pankaj Advani clinches his 26th world title at the IBSF World Snooker Championship 2024.
items.excerpt: Indian cue sports legend Pankaj Advani clinches his 26th world title at the IBSF World Snooker Championship 2024.

items.title: District Championship 2024 Announced
items.description: Jalandhar District Cue Sports Association announces the annual district championship with record prize money and participation.
items.excerpt: Jalandhar District Cue Sports Association announces the annual district championship with record prize money and participation.

items.title: New Training Facility Inaugurated
items.description: State-of-the-art training facility with 10 professional tables inaugurated to nurture young talent in cue sports.
items.excerpt: State-of-the-art training facility with 10 professional tables inaugurated to nurture young talent in cue sports.

items.title: Youth Development Program Launch
items.description: New youth development program aims to identify and train promising young players from schools across the district.
items.excerpt: New youth development program aims to identify and train promising young players from schools across the district.

about.heading: About
about.text: Jalandhar District Cue Sports Association is dedicated to promoting and developing cue sports in the region. We organize tournaments, provide training facilities, and support players in their journey to excellence.
